productDisplayName: Nike Women Be Fast Purple Capri
description: CompositionPurple capris made of 87% nylon and 13% spandex, with a broad elasticated waist, printed Dri-Fit badge at the back, and embroidered nike Athletic Department badge near the left waistFittingSnugWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like coloursDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachLine dryWarm ironDo not dry cleanStylish to the T, these nylon capris from nike are engineered with Dri-Fit technology and designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with Nike performance t-shirts and sports shoes for that smart, sporty look.
